name: lmp-label-generator
tagline: Generate professional product labels in LMP format and push directly to LabelMake Pro designer
description:
A skill that turns natural language descriptions into professional label designs using the LMP (Label Management Project) open format.

Describe the label you need — product type, size, brand, colors — and the skill generates a complete LMP JSON with proper layout zones, typography hierarchy, barcodes, and color schemes. Two modes supported:

**Mode A (Local)**: Saves the LMP file locally for manual import.
**Mode B (Cloud Push)**: Calls your LabelMake Pro SaaS API and opens the label directly in the designer — no copy-paste needed.

Perfect for product labels, shipping labels, price tags, and any label that needs to be quickly designed and printed.
author: LabelMake Pro Team

permissions.filesystem: Write generated LMP JSON to local file (Mode A fallback when API is unavailable)
permissions.http: POST generated LMP data to user-configured SaaS API endpoint (Mode B cloud push, user's own endpoint only)
